created_for: synthetic explicit config ranking diff smoke check only
default_behavior: No-config scoring remains unchanged; this config is used only when explicitly supplied.

constraint_weights.rationale: Synthetic smoke config intentionally changes the leakage blocking weight so weighted_score diff wiring can be checked.
constraint_weights.no_oracle_safe_reason: Uses only the no-oracle leakage flag and violation count, not future, gold, or expected-action information.
constraint_weights.expected_effect: When a synthetic leakage violation is present, weighted_score differs from no-config scoring.
constraint_weights.risk_note: This fixture is not a performance policy and must not be used for real data tuning.

constraint_weights.rationale: Keeps observed-edit-text safety blocking aligned with current default behavior.
constraint_weights.no_oracle_safe_reason: Uses only the safety flag, not observed edit text.
constraint_weights.expected_effect: Candidate is blocked when violation_count is greater than zero.
constraint_weights.risk_note: Observed edit text can be target leakage for prediction-time scoring.

constraint_weights.rationale: Keeps unsafe-candidate blocking aligned with current default behavior.
constraint_weights.no_oracle_safe_reason: Uses only the no_oracle_safe safety flag.
constraint_weights.expected_effect: Candidate is blocked when violation_count is greater than zero.
constraint_weights.risk_note: Unsafe candidates must not compete with safe candidates.

rationale: Synthetic smoke-test config for explicit config ranking diff checks only. It is not connected to default scoring and is not a performance claim.
synthetic_only_notice: Synthetic design fixture only; no real participant data is used.
expected_action_usage_policy: Expected actions are not used for scoring or weight tuning.

forbidden_information_policy.raw_text_policy: Raw text patterns and local context strings are not allowed in config.
